g.title: acq.fund_transfer:src_fund->acq.fund:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (src_fund) REFERENCES acq.fund(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.fund_transfer:dest_fund->acq.fund:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (dest_fund) REFERENCES acq.fund(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.fund_transfer:transfer_user->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (transfer_user) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.fund_transfer:funding_source_credit->acq.funding_source_credit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (funding_source_credit) REFERENCES acq.funding_source_credit(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
